name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Gossip between God's.

̊+‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧+ ̊

For someone with a high status, he definitely did have a lot of gossip about the other God's.

── .✦

CW/TW: None that I can think of!

AN: sorry for being on hiatus everyone😭 im planning on doing many Halloween/autumn themed Ghost bots, and no im not participating in kinktober

(; ́-`)

I don't usually make the User speak in the initial message since I'd like to give yall more of a free storytelling but I couldn't think of a scenario for this one. I did some research that the Greek Gods loved to gossip so I had to make a bot of that. (ФωФ)

If the bot speaks for you, thats an issue on behalf off J.ai LLM. Not mine, but i tried to tweak it so the bot doesn't speak for you. ≽^• ˕ • ྀི≼
